titleStmt.title: SII 24.409: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 409. (A.R. No. 16 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, EAST AND NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift 1200 poṉ and 3 villages in Kīḻaimuṟi and Mēlaimuṟi of Vaḍagarai-Maḻanāḍu in Tiruchchirāppaḷḷi-uśāvaḍi by the king on the occasion of his visit to the temple with his queens Ōduva Tirumalai Ammaṉ and Varadāchchi and prince Chikka-Veṅkaṭādri, for conducting, with the income thereon, services to the god in their respective names, Gives a full account, of the king's military achievements in the introductory portion, the date of his coronation viz., Śaka 1451, Virōdhin, Kārttīka ba. 5, and mentions Nallār-Ayyaṅgār as the royal preceptor. Mention is made of an interesting fact that in the course of a dispute between the temples of Śrīraṅgam and Jambukēśvaram it was stipulated that while the Āmbiṟa-tīrtha in Chembiyanallūr in Vaḍagarai-Maḻanāḍu belongs to god Raṅganātha, the village also must go to the god. The details of the date viz., Vijaiya, Āshāḍha, ba. 12, correspond to 1533 A.D., July 18, Friday, but are not sufficient for verification.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti . śrīman mahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīrapratāpa muvarāyarakaṇṭa hariyarāyavipāṭa Aṣṭatikkurāya maṉopayaṅkara pāṇṭiyarājastāpanāśārya pūṟuvatekṣiṇapaccima Uttara capta camuttirātiśvara śrīaccutatevamahārāyar pṛthuvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cālivāhana saka varuṣaṅkaḷ 100 4 10 51- ceṉṟu viroti samtsarattu kārttikai bahuḷa pañcamināḷ paṭṭābhikṣekattukku kaṟtarāy Abhayahastarāyasaṅkaḷukku saraṇahasta- rākiya vantaṅkaḷarāyaṇaRead nuṅkehaḷḷirāyaṇa rāja Ūmattūr mallarājapāḷaiyattil veṅkaṭāttiṟi mutalāṉa peṟku pālittu pūmiketamāyirunta maṉṉiyar Aṉantam Āṉa maṉṉiyar kaḷaiyum maṉṉittu tiruvaṭirācciyattukku maṉṉiyar taḷavāṭaraiyum kūṭṭi tiruvuḷam paṟṟi tāmraparṇṇikaraiyil ceyastampam ṉaṭṭu tiruvaṭi kaiyil kappamum pāṇṭiya rājar kumārattiyaiyum Aḻaippittukkoṇṭu tiruvuḷampatti tumpicci cāḷuva nāyakkar Avarkaḷaiyum cayittu nantaṉasamvatsarattu Ācāṭamāsam cutta deśa
mināḷ kāñcipurattu Eḻuntaruḷi Ekādeśināḷ tulāpuruṣam mahādānam sahasra kotāṉam mahāpūtakeṇatāṉaṅkaḷukku Ati vāsamum paṇṇi Aruḷi Ammaṉ Avarkaḷ śva(v)āmi veṅkaṭāttiṟi Uḷppaṭa muttiṉ tulāpuruṣam corṉṉa tulāpuruṣam tuvāteci nāḷ sahastraRead sahasrakotāṉa nittiyatāṉam Uḷppaṭap paṇṇi vicaiyasamvatsarattu Ācāṭa bhaguḷa tuvaāteci nāḷ ciraṅkattukku Eḻuntaruḷi perumāḷ śrīraṅganātatevaraiyum cevittu nammuṭaiya Avasaram Āka perumāḷ śrīraṅganātatevar Amutu ceytaruḷak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa nāḷ Oṉṟukku taḷikai patiṉāṟu yituvum pāyacam taḷikai Oṉṟu Āka taḷikai patiṉ Eḻukkum Atirasam paṭi Oṉṟu Appam paṭi Oṉṟu Āka Inta vakaikku Amutupaṭi paruppu Amutu ney Amutu karuppuk kaṭṭi Amutu kaṟi Amutu campāram Erikarumpu Uḷppaṭṭavakaikku nāḷ Oṉ
ṟukkuk kūṭṭiṉa poṉ 10 6[ (1/2)u] nya® Āka mācam Oṉṟukku pon_ 5 10 Āka varuṣam Oṉṟukkuk kūṭṭiṉa ḷe 600 Ituvum Ammaṉ varatācci Ammaṉ Avasaram Āka Amutu ceytaruḷa poliyūṭṭākak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa nāḷ Oṉṟukku taḷikai 10 kku Amutu paṭi paruppu Amutu ney Amutu karuppukkaṭṭi Amutu kaṟi Amutu campāram Erikarumpu Uḷppaṭṭa vakaikku nāḷ Oṉṟukku U 8 Āka māsam Oṉṟukku ḷe 2 10 4 Āka varuṣam Oṉṟukku ḷe 2 100 8 10 8 Ituvum cikka veṅkaṭāttiri Upaiyam Āka caṅkiṟama tirunāḷ pāṭi veṭṭaikku vaṭakarai cempiya nallūr Āmpiṟatiṟtta maṇṭa pattil perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷi Amutu ceytaruḷak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa taḷikai 5 10 pori Amutu Añcukalam Atirasappaṭi Iraṇṭu vaṭaippaṭi Iraṇṭu cukiyaṉ paṭi Iraṇṭu veccamutu kūṉ 5 10 pāṉakam kūṉ 5 10 cantaṇamppaṭi Irupatu Aṭaikkāy Amutu2 1000 Ilai Amutu 3 1000 Iḷanir2 100 paḻam
1000 tirukkuttumaṇi viḷakku pantattukku ney Amutu Āka Inta vakaikku celavukku ḷe 5 10 5 nammuṭaiya kurukkaḷ nallār Ayyaṅkāṟku dharmmam Otuva tirumalai Ammaṉ Avasaram Āka Amutu ceytaruḷak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa nāḷ Oṉṟukkut taḷikai Āṟukku Amutupaṭi paruppu Amutu ney Amutu karuppukkaṭṭi Amutu kaṟi Amutu campāram Eri karumpu Uṭpaṭa vakaikku nāḷ Oṉṟukku U 6[4 10] Āka varuṣam Oṉṟukkuk kūṭṭiṉa ḷe 100 7 10 Āka ḷe 1000 100 10 3 Itukku Ammaṉ varatācci Ammaṉ Avasarattukku poliyūṭṭāka Amutu ceytaruḷak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa taḷikai pattukkupoli yūṭṭukku śrīpaṇṭārattil mutaliṭṭa ḷe 1000 2 100 Intatap poṉ Āyirattu Iṟu nūṟṟukku vaṭṭi māsam Oṉṟukku nūṟṟukku Iraṇṭu viḻukkāṭu Āka varuṣam Oṉṟukku vaṭṭikku kūṭṭiṉa ḷe 2 100 8 10 8 nikki ḷe 8 100 2 10 5ý yintap poṉ 8 100 2 10 5kkum tiruviṭai Āṭṭam Ākac certta tiruccilāppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭi vaṭakarai maḻai nāṭu melai muṟi nelveli Ūr 1- kku Uṭkiṭai rūpāy 8(1/2)ý cekaṉkuṭi Ūr 1- kku Uḷkkiṭai rūpāy 3 nta
Uppūr Uṭkkiṭai rūpāy 1li kiḻemuṟi tuṟaiyyūr Uṭkkiṭai tevatānam rūpāy 5- li caṅkenti Uṭkkiṭai rūpāy 1- li teṉkkarai Irāca kempiravaḷanāṭu koṭi Ālam Uḷkkiṭai rūpāy 4- li pāṇṭamaṅkalam Uḷkkiṭai rūpāy 2liý maṇaṟpiṭināṭu putuvūr Uḷkkiṭai Uḻavaṉāl rūpāy 10- likku Irācavipāṭaṉāl rūpāy 5- li Uṭkkiṭai kiṟāmaṅkaḷil rūpāy 3Mistake for 4 0(1/4) Ituvum tiruvāṉaikkātevamaṇṭalac cirmai Āṉa vaṭakarai maḻanāṭṭil cem piyanallūrile Āmpiṟatiṟttam perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar tiṟttam Āka yirukkaiyil Antakkiṟāmmum śrīraṅganāthatevarukke Ākaveṇum Eṉṟu tiruvāṉaik kāvukku piṟatikkiṟāmam Āka paṇṭāra vāṭaiyilk kiṟāmam naṅkaimaṅkalam tiruvāṉaikkāvukku tevamaṇṭalam Āka viṭṭu kumāracikkaveṅkaṭāttiṟi Upaiyam Āka caṅkiṟammat tirunāḷ pāṭiveṭṭaikku perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷa viṭṭa cempiya nallūr Ūr 1� melaicceri Ūr 1 Āka Ūr 3 Uṭkiṭai kiṟāma(m)ccervai rūpāy 3 10 2 Āka Inta Uṭkkiṭaik kiṟāmaccervai viṭṭa Inta Ūrkaḷil nāṉ(ṅ)ku El
laikku Uḷppaṭṭa nañce puñce nattam paṭukai tiṭar māvaṭai maravaṭai Uḷppaṭṭa samasta prāttiyum cantiṟātittavaraiyum caṟuvamāṉiyam Āka naṭakkattakkatāka Iraṅkanātaṉ caṉṉatiyile tārāpūṟuvam Āka kuṭuttapaṭi Āle Inta Ūr muṉṟum Uḷkkiṭaik kiṟāmam nilam muppatekālum santra Ādityavaraiyum caṟuvamāṉiyam Āka Aṉupavittukkoḷḷavum . viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu nālil Oṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku taḷikai Eṭṭekālum taḷikai Avapiṭaṉāyum Appam patiṉmuṉṟum nammuṭaiya taṟmam Āka cattiṟam Āka Iṭakkaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭapaṭi Āle Ācantrāhāgyastāyi Āka naṭakkakkaṭavatākavum .
Digital edition of SII 24.409 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
